problem_statement: PR #33690: Fix return code for unimplemented functions in driver APIs (ENOSYS vs ENOTSUP). Fixes issue: RFC: clarification and standardization of ENOTSUP/ENOSYS error returns. Fix wrong usage of return codes in driver APIs and remove bogus checkpatch warning. It turn out, majority of usage of ENOTSUP (~1000) in drivers is correct and we are just using the wrong return code in a few places mostly on the the APIs level and in a few headers only. This resolves #23727
